channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Anson Road/Cricklewood Broadway - Fly-Posts, 10th March
item.description:
Anson Road/Cricklewood Broadway - Fly-Posts

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer dumped in the alleyway last night, 10th March
item.description:
Despite receiving an update message from fix my street stating this issue had been fixed. The fridge freezer is still in the alleyway. This has not been cleared by the council contractors.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anthony Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Clerkenwell Road, Clerkenwell, Greater London

item.title: The wait button in the central island isn't working, 10th March
item.description:
The button seems stuck inside the unit on centre island.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Range of flytipped rubbish at entrance to Waldenshaw Road from Manor Mount, 10th March
item.description:
Numerous fly tipped rubbish including chairs, tables, carpets,packaging,cabinets

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waldenshaw Road, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish outside L&Q flats Maddocks Close, 10th March
item.description:
Ongoing problem with rubbish dumped on the green verge outside the flats. This location in Maddocks Close, DA14 has become a repeated fly-tipping hotspot. Waste is regularly dumped outside the flats and the problem continues even after occasional clearances. I have reported this to L&Q Group and to the council previously. Could this location please be reviewed by the Enviro-Crime / enforcement team as a persistent dumping site so preventative measures can be considered (e.g. signage, monitoring or enforcement)?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maddocks Close, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost is leaning over, 10th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Patterdale Close, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of building debris, woid, planks, buckets pjaster erc, 10th March
item.description:
This has either been dumped by development 22/24 Powell Road or no 6 Powell Road where major works making place and I believe the rubbish was originally in front of that property. This is right under my lounge window (20a) and will encourage tipping to gro
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powell Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Car park area, 10th March
item.description:
I reported this weeks ago abd since then the pile of fly tipping has increased. I read thr Brent newsletter about smart cameras catching people but why are they not installed here? This is a fly tipping hot-spot and i can not recall the last time there was no rubbish left here.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)
